---
title: "Mapa"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://unpkg.com/maplibre-gl@4.1.2/dist/maplibre-gl.css" rel="stylesheet">
        <script src="https://unpkg.com/maplibre-gl@4.1.2/dist/maplibre-gl.js"></script>
        <style>#title-block-header { display: none !important; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="map-page-shell">
<!-- TOOLBAR -->
<div class="map-toolbar">
  <span class="toolbar-label">Any:</span>
  <button class="year-btn" onclick="setYear(1931, this)">1931</button>
  <button class="year-btn" onclick="setYear(1933, this)">1933</button>
  <button class="year-btn active" onclick="setYear(1936, this)">1936</button>
  <div class="toolbar-sep"></div>
  <span class="toolbar-label">Mostrar:</span>
  <button class="var-btn active" onclick="setVar('left', this)">Esquerra</button>
  <button class="var-btn" onclick="setVar('right', this)">Dreta</button>
  <button class="var-btn" onclick="setVar('basque', this)">Nac. basc</button>
  <button class="var-btn" onclick="setVar('centrist', this)">Centre</button>
  <button class="var-btn" onclick="setVar('other', this)">Altres</button>
  <button class="var-btn" onclick="setVar('blank_null', this)">Blancs/Nuls</button>
  <button class="var-btn" onclick="setVar('turnout', this)">Participació</button>
  <button class="var-btn" onclick="setVar('turnout_est', this)">Participació (est.)</button>
  <div class="toolbar-sep"></div>
  <div class="search-wrap">
    <input class="search-input" id="muni-search" type="text" placeholder="Cerca municipi…" autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false">
    <ul class="search-suggestions" id="search-suggestions" hidden></ul>
  </div>
  <div class="map-zoom-filters">
    <select class="map-filter-select" id="community-select" aria-label="Seleccionar comunitat autonoma">
      <option value="">Comunitat autonoma…</option>
    </select>
    <select class="map-filter-select" id="district-select" aria-label="Seleccionar districte">
      <option value="">Districte…</option>
    </select>
  </div>
  <span class="toolbar-label" style="margin-left:auto;opacity:0.4;font-size:0.6rem;white-space:nowrap;">Cursor sobre municipi per detalls</span>
</div>

<!-- MAP -->
<div class="map-container">
  <div id="map"></div>
  <div class="map-selection-notice" id="selection-notice" hidden></div>
  <div class="map-legend">
    <div class="legend-title" id="legend-title">Coalició d'esquerres</div>
    <div class="legend-gradient" id="legend-gradient"
      style="background:linear-gradient(to right,#d73027,#fc8d59,#ffffbf,#91cf60,#1a9850)"></div>
    <div class="legend-gradient-labels"><span>0%</span><span>50%</span><span>100%</span></div>
    <div class="legend-item" style="margin-top:0.6rem;">
      <div class="legend-swatch" style="background:#cccccc"></div><span>Sense dades</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>

<script>
const VAR_CONFIG = {
  left:      {
    label: 'Coalició esquerres',
    prop: (y) => `left_${y}`,
    gradient: 'linear-gradient(to right,#d73027,#fc8d59,#ffffbf,#91cf60,#1a9850)',
    ramp: (p) => ['interpolate',['linear'],['get',p], 0,'#d73027', 0.3,'#fc8d59', 0.5,'#ffffbf', 0.7,'#91cf60', 1,'#1a9850']
  },
  right:     {
    label: 'Coalició dretes',
    prop: (y) => `right_${y}`,
    gradient: 'linear-gradient(to right,#deebf7,#9ecae1,#4292c6,#2171b5,#08519c)',
    ramp: (p) => ['interpolate',['linear'],['get',p], 0,'#deebf7', 0.25,'#9ecae1', 0.5,'#4292c6', 0.75,'#2171b5', 1,'#08519c']
  },
  basque:    {
    label: 'Coal. nac. basca',
    prop: (y) => `basque_${y}`,
    gradient: 'linear-gradient(to right,#fff7e6,#fed98e,#fe9929,#cc4c02,#7f2704)',
    ramp: (p) => ['interpolate',['linear'],['get',p], 0,'#fff7e6', 0.1,'#fed98e', 0.3,'#fe9929', 0.6,'#cc4c02', 1,'#7f2704']
  },
  centrist:  {
    label: 'Plataformes centristes',
    prop: (y) => `centrist_${y}`,
    gradient: 'linear-gradient(to right,#f0f9e8,#a8ddb5,#43a2ca,#0868ac)',
    ramp: (p) => ['interpolate',['linear'],['get',p], 0,'#f0f9e8', 0.2,'#a8ddb5', 0.5,'#43a2ca', 1,'#0868ac']
  },
  other:     {
    label: 'Altres partits',
    prop: (y) => `other_${y}`,
    gradient: 'linear-gradient(to right,#f7f7f7,#c2a5cf,#7b2d8b)',
    ramp: (p) => ['interpolate',['linear'],['get',p], 0,'#f7f7f7', 0.3,'#c2a5cf', 0.6,'#9970ab', 1,'#7b2d8b']
  },
  blank_null:{
    label: 'Vots en blanc i nuls',
    prop: (y) => `blank_null_${y}`,
    gradient: 'linear-gradient(to right,#f7f7f7,#969696,#252525)',
    ramp: (p) => ['interpolate',['linear'],['get',p], 0,'#f7f7f7', 0.3,'#bdbdbd', 0.6,'#636363', 1,'#252525']
  },
  turnout:   {
    label: 'Participació electoral',
    prop: (y) => `turnout_${y}`,
    gradient: 'linear-gradient(to right,#f7fbff,#6baed6,#08306b)',
    ramp: (p) => ['interpolate',['linear'],['get',p], 0,'#f7fbff', 0.4,'#6baed6', 0.7,'#2171b5', 1,'#08306b']
  },
  turnout_est: {
    label: 'Participació electoral (estimada)',
    prop: (y) => `turnout_est_${y}`,
    gradient: 'linear-gradient(to right,#fff7f3,#fde0dd,#fa9fb5,#c51b8a,#7a0177)',
    ramp: (p) => ['interpolate',['linear'],['get',p], 0,'#fff7f3', 0.25,'#fde0dd', 0.5,'#fa9fb5', 0.75,'#c51b8a', 1,'#7a0177']
  },
};

let currentYear = 1936;
let currentVar  = 'left';
let showDistricts = true;
let muniIndex = [];
let communityIndex = [];
let districtIndex31 = [];
let districtIndex33_36 = [];

const PROV_TO_COMMUNITY = {
  'Albacete': 'Castella-La Manxa',
  'Alicante/Alacant': 'País Valencià',
  'Almería': 'Andalusia',
  'Araba/Álava': 'Pais Basc',
  'Asturias': 'Asturies',
  'Badajoz': 'Extremadura',
  'Balears, Illes': 'Illes Balears',
  'Barcelona': 'Catalunya',
  'Bizkaia': 'Pais Basc',
  'Burgos': 'Castella i Lleo',
  'Cantabria': 'Cantabria',
  'Castellón/Castelló': 'País Valencià',
  'Ceuta': 'Ceuta',
  'Ciudad Real': 'Castella-La Manxa',
  'Coruña, A': 'Galicia',
  'Cuenca': 'Castella-La Manxa',
  'Cáceres': 'Extremadura',
  'Cádiz': 'Andalusia',
  'Córdoba': 'Andalusia',
  'Gipuzkoa': 'Pais Basc',
  'Girona': 'Catalunya',
  'Granada': 'Andalusia',
  'Guadalajara': 'Castella-La Manxa',
  'Huelva': 'Andalusia',
  'Huesca': 'Arago',
  'Jaén': 'Andalusia',
  'León': 'Castella i Lleo',
  'Lleida': 'Catalunya',
  'Lugo': 'Galicia',
  'Madrid': 'Comunitat de Madrid',
  'Melilla': 'Melilla',
  'Murcia': 'Regio de Murcia',
  'Málaga': 'Andalusia',
  'Navarra': 'Navarra',
  'Ourense': 'Galicia',
  'Palencia': 'Castella i Lleo',
  'Palmas, Las': 'Canaries',
  'Pontevedra': 'Galicia',
  'Rioja, La': 'La Rioja',
  'Salamanca': 'Castella i Lleo',
  'Santa Cruz de Tenerife': 'Canaries',
  'Segovia': 'Castella i Lleo',
  'Sevilla': 'Andalusia',
  'Soria': 'Castella i Lleo',
  'Tarragona': 'Catalunya',
  'Teruel': 'Arago',
  'Toledo': 'Castella-La Manxa',
  'Valencia/València': 'País Valencià',
  'Valladolid': 'Castella i Lleo',
  'Zamora': 'Castella i Lleo',
  'Zaragoza': 'Arago',
  'Ávila': 'Castella i Lleo'
};

const COMMUNITY_NAME_TO_KEY = {
  'Andalusia': 'and',
  'Arago': 'ara',
  'Asturies': 'ast',
  'Canaries': 'canary',
  'Cantabria': 'can',
  'Castella i Lleo': 'cyl',
  'Castella-La Manxa': 'clm',
  'Catalunya': 'cat',
  'Ceuta': 'ceu',
  'Comunitat de Madrid': 'mad',
  'Extremadura': 'ext',
  'Galicia': 'gal',
  'Illes Balears': 'bal',
  'La Rioja': 'rio',
  'Melilla': 'mel',
  'Navarra': 'nav',
  'Pais Basc': 'pv',
  'País Valencià': 'val',
  'Regio de Murcia': 'mur'
};

function flatCoords(geom) {
  if (geom.type === 'Polygon') return geom.coordinates[0];
  if (geom.type === 'MultiPolygon') return geom.coordinates.flat(2);
  return [];
}

function buildSearchIndex(geojson) {
  muniIndex = geojson.features
    .filter(f => f.properties && f.properties.nombre)
    .map(f => {
      const pts = flatCoords(f.geometry);
      let x0=Infinity, x1=-Infinity, y0=Infinity, y1=-Infinity;
      for (const pt of pts) {
        if (pt[0]<x0) x0=pt[0]; if (pt[0]>x1) x1=pt[0];
        if (pt[1]<y0) y0=pt[1]; if (pt[1]>y1) y1=pt[1];
      }
      return {nombre: f.properties.nombre, provincia: f.properties.provincia||'', bbox:[[x0,y0],[x1,y1]]};
    });
}

function mergeBbox(target, bbox) {
  if (!bbox) return target;
  if (!target) return [[bbox[0][0], bbox[0][1]], [bbox[1][0], bbox[1][1]]];
  target[0][0] = Math.min(target[0][0], bbox[0][0]);
  target[0][1] = Math.min(target[0][1], bbox[0][1]);
  target[1][0] = Math.max(target[1][0], bbox[1][0]);
  target[1][1] = Math.max(target[1][1], bbox[1][1]);
  return target;
}

function featureBbox(feature) {
  const pts = flatCoords(feature.geometry);
  if (!pts.length) return null;
  let x0 = Infinity, x1 = -Infinity, y0 = Infinity, y1 = -Infinity;
  for (const pt of pts) {
    if (pt[0] < x0) x0 = pt[0];
    if (pt[0] > x1) x1 = pt[0];
    if (pt[1] < y0) y0 = pt[1];
    if (pt[1] > y1) y1 = pt[1];
  }
  return [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]];
}

function buildCommunityIndex(geojson) {
  const communityBoxes = new Map();
  geojson.features.forEach((feature) => {
    const provincia = feature?.properties?.provincia;
    const community = PROV_TO_COMMUNITY[provincia];
    if (!community) return;
    const bbox = featureBbox(feature);
    if (!bbox) return;
    const existing = communityBoxes.get(community) || {bbox: null, provinces: new Set()};
    existing.bbox = mergeBbox(existing.bbox, bbox);
    existing.provinces.add(provincia);
    communityBoxes.set(community, existing);
  });

  communityIndex = Array.from(communityBoxes.entries())
    .map(([name, data]) => ({name, key: COMMUNITY_NAME_TO_KEY[name] || null, bbox: data.bbox, provinces: Array.from(data.provinces)}))
    .sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
}

function resetFocusState() {
  selectedCommunityName = null;
  selectedCommunityKey = null;
  selectedCommunityProvinces = [];
  selectedDistrictName = null;
}

function setCommunityFocus(name, provinces) {
  selectedCommunityName = name;
  selectedCommunityKey = COMMUNITY_NAME_TO_KEY[name] || null;
  selectedCommunityProvinces = provinces || [];
  selectedDistrictName = null;
}

function setDistrictFocus(name) {
  selectedDistrictName = name;
  selectedCommunityName = null;
  selectedCommunityKey = null;
  selectedCommunityProvinces = [];
}

function emptyFilter() {
  return ['==', ['get', 'cod_muni'], '__none__'];
}

function selectedCommunityFilter() {
  if (!selectedCommunityProvinces.length) return emptyFilter();
  return ['in', ['get', 'provincia'], ['literal', selectedCommunityProvinces]];
}

function updateFocusVisuals() {
  if (!map.getLayer('municipios-fill')) return;

  if (selectedCommunityName && selectedCommunityProvinces.length) {
    map.setPaintProperty('municipios-fill', 'fill-opacity', [
      'case',
      selectedCommunityFilter(),
      0.86,
      0.26
    ]);
  } else {
    map.setPaintProperty('municipios-fill', 'fill-opacity', 0.82);
  }

  if (map.getLayer('community-focus-outline')) {
    const keyValue = selectedCommunityKey || '__none__';
    map.setFilter('community-focus-outline', ['==', ['get', 'community_key'], keyValue]);
    map.setLayoutProperty('community-focus-outline', 'visibility', selectedCommunityKey ? 'visible' : 'none');
  }

  const focusYear1931 = currentYear === 1931;
  const districtName = selectedDistrictName || '__none__';

  if (map.getLayer('district-focus-mask-31')) {
    map.setLayoutProperty('district-focus-mask-31', 'visibility', focusYear1931 && selectedDistrictName ? 'visible' : 'none');
    map.setFilter('district-focus-mask-31', ['!=', ['get', 'dist31'], districtName]);
  }
  if (map.getLayer('district-focus-outline-31')) {
    map.setLayoutProperty('district-focus-outline-31', 'visibility', focusYear1931 && selectedDistrictName ? 'visible' : 'none');
    map.setFilter('district-focus-outline-31', ['==', ['get', 'dist31'], districtName]);
  }
  if (map.getLayer('district-focus-mask-33-36')) {
    map.setLayoutProperty('district-focus-mask-33-36', 'visibility', !focusYear1931 && selectedDistrictName ? 'visible' : 'none');
    map.setFilter('district-focus-mask-33-36', ['!=', ['get', 'dist33_36'], districtName]);
  }
  if (map.getLayer('district-focus-outline-33-36')) {
    map.setLayoutProperty('district-focus-outline-33-36', 'visibility', !focusYear1931 && selectedDistrictName ? 'visible' : 'none');
    map.setFilter('district-focus-outline-33-36', ['==', ['get', 'dist33_36'], districtName]);
  }
}

function buildDistrictIndex(geojson, key) {
  const rows = geojson.features
    .filter(f => f.properties && f.properties[key])
    .map(f => ({name: f.properties[key], bbox: featureBbox(f)}))
    .filter(d => !!d.bbox)
    .sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));

  if (key === 'dist33_36' && !rows.some(d => d.name === 'Barcelona (provincia)')) {
    const barcelonaRows = muniIndex.filter(m => m.provincia === 'Barcelona' && m.bbox);
    if (barcelonaRows.length) {
      const merged = barcelonaRows.reduce((acc, m) => mergeBbox(acc, m.bbox), null);
      rows.push({name: 'Barcelona (provincia)', bbox: merged});
      rows.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
    }
  }

  return rows;
}

function updateDistrictSelectOptions() {
  const districtSelect = document.getElementById('district-select');
  if (!districtSelect) return;

  const is1931 = currentYear === 1931;
  const districts = is1931 ? districtIndex31 : districtIndex33_36;
  const placeholder = is1931 ? 'Districte (1931)…' : 'Districte (1933-1936)…';

  districtSelect.innerHTML = '';
  const firstOption = document.createElement('option');
  firstOption.value = '';
  firstOption.textContent = placeholder;
  districtSelect.appendChild(firstOption);

  districts.forEach((district, index) => {
    const option = document.createElement('option');
    option.value = String(index);
    option.textContent = district.name;
    districtSelect.appendChild(option);
  });

  districtSelect.disabled = districts.length === 0;
}

function initGeoSelectors() {
  const communitySelect = document.getElementById('community-select');
  const districtSelect = document.getElementById('district-select');
  if (!communitySelect || !districtSelect) return;

  communitySelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
    const selected = communityIndex.find(c => c.name === communitySelect.value);
    if (!selected) {
      resetFocusState();
      updateFocusVisuals();
      showSelectionNotice('', '');
      return;
    }
    districtSelect.selectedIndex = 0;
    setCommunityFocus(selected.name, selected.provinces);
    updateFocusVisuals();
    map.fitBounds(selected.bbox, {padding: 55, maxZoom: 8.5, duration: 800});
    showSelectionNotice(UI_TEXT.selectedCommunity, selected.name);
  });

  districtSelect.addEventListener('change', () => {
    const is1931 = currentYear === 1931;
    const districts = is1931 ? districtIndex31 : districtIndex33_36;
    const index = Number(districtSelect.value);
    if (!Number.isInteger(index) || !districts[index]) {
      resetFocusState();
      updateFocusVisuals();
      showSelectionNotice('', '');
      return;
    }
    communitySelect.selectedIndex = 0;
    setDistrictFocus(districts[index].name);
    updateFocusVisuals();
    map.fitBounds(districts[index].bbox, {padding: 55, maxZoom: 10, duration: 800});
    showSelectionNotice(UI_TEXT.selectedDistrict, districts[index].name);
  });
}

function fillCommunitySelect() {
  const communitySelect = document.getElementById('community-select');
  if (!communitySelect) return;

  communityIndex.forEach((community) => {
    const option = document.createElement('option');
    option.value = community.name;
    option.textContent = community.name;
    communitySelect.appendChild(option);
  });

  communitySelect.disabled = communityIndex.length === 0;
}

function initSearch() {
  const input = document.getElementById('muni-search');
  const list  = document.getElementById('search-suggestions');
  if (!input) return;
  input.addEventListener('input', () => {
    const q = input.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    list.innerHTML = '';
    if (q.length < 2) { list.hidden = true; return; }
    const hits = muniIndex.filter(m => m.nombre.toLowerCase().includes(q)).slice(0, 8);
    if (!hits.length) { list.hidden = true; return; }
    hits.forEach(m => {
      const li = document.createElement('li');
      li.className = 'search-suggestion-item';
      li.innerHTML = `<span class="sug-name">${m.nombre}</span><span class="sug-prov">${m.provincia}</span>`;
      li.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
        e.preventDefault();
        map.fitBounds(m.bbox, {padding: 50, maxZoom: 12, duration: 800});
        input.value = m.nombre;
        list.hidden = true;
      });
      list.appendChild(li);
    });
    list.hidden = false;
  });
  input.addEventListener('blur', () => { setTimeout(() => { list.hidden = true; }, 150); });
  input.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') { list.hidden = true; input.blur(); } });
}

const DEFAULT_VIEW = {center: [-3.7, 40.2], zoom: 5.5, bearing: 0, pitch: 0};

const UI_TEXT = {
  reset: 'Reinicia zoom',
  resetTitle: 'Torna al zoom inicial',
  borders: 'Districtes',
  bordersTitle: 'Mostra o amaga els limits de districte',
  selectedCommunity: 'Comunitat autonoma',
  selectedDistrict: 'Districte'
};

const BASEMAPS = {
  light: {
    label: 'Clar',
    tiles: ['https://a.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', 'https://b.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', 'https://c.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}.png'],
    attribution: '&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors &copy; CARTO'
  },
  streets: {
    label: 'Carrers',
    tiles: ['https://a.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', 'https://b.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', 'https://c.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}.png'],
    attribution: '&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors &copy; CARTO'
  },
  satellite: {
    label: 'Satel.lit',
    tiles: ['https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}'],
    attribution: 'Tiles &copy; Esri'
  }
};

function showSelectionNotice(kind, name) {
  const notice = document.getElementById('selection-notice');
  if (!notice) return;
  if (!name) {
    notice.hidden = true;
    return;
  }
  notice.textContent = `${kind}: ${name}`;
  notice.hidden = false;
}

const map = new maplibregl.Map({
  container: 'map',
  style: {
    version: 8,
    sources: {},
    layers: [{id: 'bg', type: 'background', paint: {'background-color': '#f5f0e8'}}]
  },
  center: DEFAULT_VIEW.center, zoom: DEFAULT_VIEW.zoom, minZoom: 4, maxZoom: 14
});
map.addControl(new maplibregl.NavigationControl(), 'top-left');
map.addControl(new maplibregl.ScaleControl({unit: 'metric'}), 'bottom-left');
const popup = new maplibregl.Popup({closeButton: false, closeOnClick: false, maxWidth: '300px'});

let districtToggleButton = null;
let lockedMunicipioId = null;
let lockedMunicipioProps = null;
let hoveredId = null;
let currentBasemap = 'light';
let selectedCommunityName = null;
let selectedCommunityKey = null;
let selectedCommunityProvinces = [];
let selectedDistrictName = null;

const geoDataPromise = Promise.all([
  fetch('../municipios.geojson').then(r => r.json()),
  fetch('../districts_31.geojson').then(r => r.json()),
  fetch('../districts_33_36.geojson').then(r => r.json())
]);

function applyBasemap(key) {
  const cfg = BASEMAPS[key];
  if (!cfg) return;
  currentBasemap = key;

  if (map.getLayer('basemap-layer')) map.removeLayer('basemap-layer');
  if (map.getSource('basemap-source')) map.removeSource('basemap-source');

  map.addSource('basemap-source', {
    type: 'raster',
    tiles: cfg.tiles,
    tileSize: 256,
    attribution: cfg.attribution
  });

  const beforeId = map.getLayer('municipios-fill') ? 'municipios-fill' : undefined;
  map.addLayer({id: 'basemap-layer', type: 'raster', source: 'basemap-source'}, beforeId);
}

function addBasemapControl() {
  class BasemapControl {
    onAdd() {
      const container = document.createElement('div');
      container.className = 'maplibregl-ctrl maplibregl-ctrl-group map-basemap-control';

      const select = document.createElement('select');
      select.className = 'map-basemap-select';
      select.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Seleccionar mapa base');

      Object.entries(BASEMAPS).forEach(([key, cfg]) => {
        const option = document.createElement('option');
        option.value = key;
        option.textContent = cfg.label;
        select.appendChild(option);
      });

      select.value = currentBasemap;
      select.addEventListener('change', () => applyBasemap(select.value));
      container.appendChild(select);
      return container;
    }

    onRemove() {}
  }

  map.addControl(new BasemapControl(), 'top-right');
}

function districtLayerVisibility(targetYear) {
  if (!showDistricts) return 'none';
  if (targetYear === 1931) return currentYear === 1931 ? 'visible' : 'none';
  return (currentYear === 1933 || currentYear === 1936) ? 'visible' : 'none';
}

function updateDistrictLayers() {
  if (map.getLayer('districts-31-line')) {
    map.setLayoutProperty('districts-31-line', 'visibility', districtLayerVisibility(1931));
  }
  if (map.getLayer('districts-33-36-line')) {
    map.setLayoutProperty('districts-33-36-line', 'visibility', districtLayerVisibility(1933));
  }
  updateDistrictToggleButton();
}

function updateDistrictToggleButton() {
  if (!districtToggleButton) return;
  if (showDistricts) {
    districtToggleButton.classList.add('active');
  } else {
    districtToggleButton.classList.remove('active');
  }
}

function addMapUtilityControls() {
  class UtilityControl {
    onAdd() {
      const container = document.createElement('div');
      container.className = 'maplibregl-ctrl maplibregl-ctrl-group map-extra-controls';

      const resetBtn = document.createElement('button');
      resetBtn.type = 'button';
      resetBtn.className = 'map-util-btn';
      resetBtn.title = UI_TEXT.resetTitle;
      resetBtn.textContent = UI_TEXT.reset;
      resetBtn.onclick = () => {
        resetFocusState();
        const communitySelect = document.getElementById('community-select');
        const districtSelect = document.getElementById('district-select');
        if (communitySelect) communitySelect.selectedIndex = 0;
        if (districtSelect) districtSelect.selectedIndex = 0;
        showSelectionNotice('', '');
        updateFocusVisuals();
        map.easeTo({
          center: DEFAULT_VIEW.center,
          zoom: DEFAULT_VIEW.zoom,
          bearing: DEFAULT_VIEW.bearing,
          pitch: DEFAULT_VIEW.pitch,
          duration: 600
        });
      };

      districtToggleButton = document.createElement('button');
      districtToggleButton.type = 'button';
      districtToggleButton.className = 'map-util-btn active';
      districtToggleButton.title = UI_TEXT.bordersTitle;
      districtToggleButton.textContent = UI_TEXT.borders;
      districtToggleButton.onclick = () => {
        showDistricts = !showDistricts;
        updateDistrictLayers();
      };

      container.append(resetBtn, districtToggleButton);
      return container;
    }

    onRemove() {}
  }

  map.addControl(new UtilityControl(), 'top-left');
}

addMapUtilityControls();
addBasemapControl();
initSearch();
initGeoSelectors();

function colorExpression() {
  const cfg  = VAR_CONFIG[currentVar];
  const prop = cfg.prop(currentYear);
  return ['case', ['!', ['has', prop]], '#cccccc', ['==', ['get', prop], null], '#cccccc', cfg.ramp(prop)];
}

function handleMunicipioMousemove(e) {
    if (!e.features.length) return;
    map.getCanvas().style.cursor = 'pointer';
    if (lockedMunicipioId !== null) return;

    if (hoveredId !== null) map.setFeatureState({source: 'municipios', id: hoveredId}, {hover: false});
    hoveredId = e.features[0].id;
    map.setFeatureState({source: 'municipios', id: hoveredId}, {hover: true});
    popup.setLngLat(e.lngLat).setHTML(buildPopup(e.features[0].properties)).addTo(map);
}

function handleMunicipioMouseleave() {
    map.getCanvas().style.cursor = '';
    if (lockedMunicipioId !== null) return;

    if (hoveredId !== null) map.setFeatureState({source: 'municipios', id: hoveredId}, {hover: false});
    hoveredId = null;
    popup.remove();
}

function handleMunicipioClick(e) {
    if (!e.features.length) return;

    const feature = e.features[0];
    const clickedId = feature.id;

    if (lockedMunicipioId === clickedId) {
      map.setFeatureState({source: 'municipios', id: lockedMunicipioId}, {hover: false});
      lockedMunicipioId = null;
      lockedMunicipioProps = null;
      popup.remove();
      return;
    }

    if (hoveredId !== null && hoveredId !== clickedId) {
      map.setFeatureState({source: 'municipios', id: hoveredId}, {hover: false});
      hoveredId = null;
    }

    if (lockedMunicipioId !== null) {
      map.setFeatureState({source: 'municipios', id: lockedMunicipioId}, {hover: false});
    }

    lockedMunicipioId = clickedId;
    lockedMunicipioProps = feature.properties;
    map.setFeatureState({source: 'municipios', id: lockedMunicipioId}, {hover: true});
    popup.setLngLat(e.lngLat).setHTML(buildPopup(feature.properties)).addTo(map);
}

function handleMapClick(e) {
    const clickedMunicipios = map.queryRenderedFeatures(e.point, {layers: ['municipios-fill']});
    if (clickedMunicipios.length || lockedMunicipioId === null) return;

    map.setFeatureState({source: 'municipios', id: lockedMunicipioId}, {hover: false});
    lockedMunicipioId = null;
    lockedMunicipioProps = null;
    popup.remove();
}

function bindMunicipioHandlers() {
  map.off('mousemove', 'municipios-fill', handleMunicipioMousemove);
  map.off('mouseleave', 'municipios-fill', handleMunicipioMouseleave);
  map.off('click', 'municipios-fill', handleMunicipioClick);
  map.off('click', handleMapClick);

  map.on('mousemove', 'municipios-fill', handleMunicipioMousemove);
  map.on('mouseleave', 'municipios-fill', handleMunicipioMouseleave);
  map.on('click', 'municipios-fill', handleMunicipioClick);
  map.on('click', handleMapClick);
}

function ensureElectionLayers() {
  if (!map.getSource('municipios')) {
    map.addSource('municipios', {type: 'geojson', data: '../municipios.geojson', generateId: true});
  }
  if (!map.getSource('districts_31')) {
    map.addSource('districts_31', {type: 'geojson', data: '../districts_31.geojson'});
  }
  if (!map.getSource('districts_33_36')) {
    map.addSource('districts_33_36', {type: 'geojson', data: '../districts_33_36.geojson'});
  }
  if (!map.getSource('communities')) {
    map.addSource('communities', {type: 'geojson', data: '../communities.geojson'});
  }

  if (!map.getLayer('municipios-fill')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'municipios-fill', type: 'fill', source: 'municipios',
      paint: {'fill-color': colorExpression(), 'fill-opacity': 0.82}});
  }
  if (!map.getLayer('municipios-line')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'municipios-line', type: 'line', source: 'municipios',
      paint: {'line-color': '#888', 'line-width': ['interpolate',['linear'],['zoom'],5,0.4,10,1.2], 'line-opacity': 0.7}});
  }
  if (!map.getLayer('district-focus-mask-31')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'district-focus-mask-31', type: 'fill', source: 'districts_31',
      layout: {'visibility': 'none'},
      paint: {'fill-color': '#ffffff', 'fill-opacity': 0.28}}, 'municipios-line');
  }
  if (!map.getLayer('district-focus-mask-33-36')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'district-focus-mask-33-36', type: 'fill', source: 'districts_33_36',
      layout: {'visibility': 'none'},
      paint: {'fill-color': '#ffffff', 'fill-opacity': 0.28}}, 'municipios-line');
  }
  if (!map.getLayer('districts-31-line')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'districts-31-line', type: 'line', source: 'districts_31',
      layout: {'visibility': districtLayerVisibility(1931)},
      paint: {'line-color': '#1f1f1f', 'line-width': ['interpolate',['linear'],['zoom'],4,0.5,8,1.1,12,1.8], 'line-opacity': 0.42}});
  }
  if (!map.getLayer('districts-33-36-line')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'districts-33-36-line', type: 'line', source: 'districts_33_36',
      layout: {'visibility': districtLayerVisibility(1933)},
      paint: {'line-color': '#1f1f1f', 'line-width': ['interpolate',['linear'],['zoom'],4,0.5,8,1.1,12,1.8], 'line-opacity': 0.42}});
  }
  if (!map.getLayer('municipios-hover')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'municipios-hover', type: 'fill', source: 'municipios',
      paint: {'fill-color': '#000', 'fill-opacity': ['case',['boolean',['feature-state','hover'],false],0.12,0]}});
  }
  if (!map.getLayer('district-focus-outline-31')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'district-focus-outline-31', type: 'line', source: 'districts_31',
      layout: {'visibility': 'none'},
      paint: {'line-color': '#141414', 'line-width': ['interpolate',['linear'],['zoom'],4,1.2,8,2.2,12,3.2], 'line-opacity': 0.95}});
  }
  if (!map.getLayer('district-focus-outline-33-36')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'district-focus-outline-33-36', type: 'line', source: 'districts_33_36',
      layout: {'visibility': 'none'},
      paint: {'line-color': '#141414', 'line-width': ['interpolate',['linear'],['zoom'],4,1.2,8,2.2,12,3.2], 'line-opacity': 0.95}});
  }
  if (!map.getLayer('community-focus-outline')) {
    map.addLayer({id: 'community-focus-outline', type: 'line', source: 'communities',
      layout: {'visibility': 'none'},
      paint: {'line-color': '#141414', 'line-width': ['interpolate',['linear'],['zoom'],4,1.1,8,1.8,12,2.8], 'line-opacity': 0.95}});
  }

  updateDistrictLayers();
  updateMap();
  updateFocusVisuals();
  updateLockedPopup();
  bindMunicipioHandlers();
}

geoDataPromise.then(([municipiosData, district31Data, district3336Data]) => {
  buildSearchIndex(municipiosData);
  buildCommunityIndex(municipiosData);
  districtIndex31 = buildDistrictIndex(district31Data, 'dist31');
  districtIndex33_36 = buildDistrictIndex(district3336Data, 'dist33_36');
  fillCommunitySelect();
  updateDistrictSelectOptions();
});

map.on('style.load', () => {
  applyBasemap(currentBasemap);
  ensureElectionLayers();
});

function buildPopup(p) {
  const fmt = (v) => (v != null && v !== '') ? (parseFloat(v) * 100).toFixed(1) + '%' : '—';

  const rows = Object.entries(VAR_CONFIG).map(([k, cfg]) => {
    const bold = (currentVar === k) ? 'font-weight:600;color:#1a1208;' : '';
    return `<tr>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b5f4e;padding:0.1rem 0.6rem 0.1rem 0;${bold}">${cfg.label}</td>
      <td style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.72rem;text-align:right;${bold}">${fmt(p[cfg.prop(currentYear)])}</td>
    </tr>`;
  }).join('');

  return `<div style="padding:0.25rem 0;">
    <div style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:0.1rem;">${p.nombre || 'Municipi'}</div>
    <div style="font-family:'DM Mono',monospace;font-size:0.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b5f4e;margin-bottom:0.75rem;">${p.provincia || ''} · ${currentYear}</div>
    <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;">${rows}</table>
  </div>`;
}

function updateLockedPopup() {
  if (!lockedMunicipioProps || !popup.isOpen()) return;
  popup.setHTML(buildPopup(lockedMunicipioProps));
}

function setYear(year, btn) {
  currentYear = year;
  document.querySelectorAll('.year-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  if (selectedDistrictName) {
    selectedDistrictName = null;
    const districtSelect = document.getElementById('district-select');
    if (districtSelect) districtSelect.selectedIndex = 0;
    showSelectionNotice('', '');
  }
  updateDistrictSelectOptions();
  updateDistrictLayers();
  updateFocusVisuals();
  updateMap();
  updateLockedPopup();
}

function setVar(varKey, btn) {
  currentVar = varKey;
  document.querySelectorAll('.var-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  updateLegend(VAR_CONFIG[varKey].label, VAR_CONFIG[varKey].gradient);
  updateMap();
  updateLockedPopup();
}

function updateMap() {
  if (map.getLayer('municipios-fill'))
    map.setPaintProperty('municipios-fill', 'fill-color', colorExpression());
}

function updateLegend(label, gradient) {
  document.getElementById('legend-title').textContent = label;
  document.getElementById('legend-gradient').style.background = gradient;
}
</script>
```
